FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class BreadcrumbBar

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI BreadcrumbBar (controls\dev\Breadcrumb): a horizontal trail of items separated by right chevrons (BreadcrumbBarChevronLeftToRight = E974, BreadcrumbBar_themeresources.xaml:5). The last item is the current page — TextFillColorPrimary at FontWeight Normal like every other crumb (BreadcrumbBarItemFontWeight, BreadcrumbBar_themeresources.xaml:8) and non-interactive (the LastItem state collapses PART_ItemButton, BreadcrumbBar.xaml:89-96); earlier items are clickable, dim to TextFillColorSecondary on hover and TextFillColorTertiary on press (themeresources:10-11), and raise onSelect(index). Keyboard: every crumb is a tab stop (DefaultBreadcrumbBarItemStyle IsTabStop=True, BreadcrumbBar.xaml:13); Left/Right move focus crumb-to-crumb (OnChildPreviewKeyDown, BreadcrumbBar.cpp:514-560). NOT implemented: the overflow ellipsis + hidden-items flyout (BreadcrumbLayout.cpp:62-69 collapses leading crumbs when the accumulated width exceeds the available size) — that needs measured-width feedback the engine does not surface yet (layout effects re-run only on re-render, never on a window-resize relayout). Per-part restyling goes through the optional parts (see TemplateParts for the contract).

public static class BreadcrumbBar

object.ToString()

Fields

PartItem

Each crumb's box — the SAME modifier runs for every crumb, the last/current one included. Owned: OnClick (navigate — re-asserted on the clickable, non-last crumbs only), Role, TabStop, OnKeyDown (arrow focus moves), OnRealized (focus-handle capture, chained).

public const string PartItem = "Item"

Field Value

string

PartSeparator

The right-chevron separator between crumbs (WinUI PART_ChevronTextBlock) — a TextEl, so style it via the generic map: parts.Set<TextEl>(BreadcrumbBar.PartSeparator, t => t with { … }). Owned: nothing (pure styling).

public const string PartSeparator = "Separator"

Field Value

string

Create(IReadOnlyList<string>, Action<int>?, TemplateParts?) 

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<string> items, Action<int>? onSelect = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

onSelect Action<int>
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
